title: rubus × pseudofruticetorum
intro: Rubus × pseudofruticetorum is a hybrid species of raspberry, derived from the crossing of Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudofruticetorum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Rubus × pseudofruticetorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
